script: APP=b1d02264-28fe-49f1-ae71-b50b6809f852; SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name emily-claude-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); echo "length=${#SECRET}"; echo -n 'first-50: '; printf '%s' "$SECRET" | cut -c 1-50; echo; echo -n 'last-30:  '; printf '%s' "$SECRET" | tail -c 30; echo; echo -n 'first-char: '; printf '%s' "$SECRET" | head -c 1; echo; echo; echo '===== Looks like JSON? =====' && printf '%s' "$SECRET" | python3 -c 'import sys,json; v=sys.stdin.read(); print("is_json=",end=""); print(isinstance(json.loads(v),(dict,list)))' 2>&1; echo; echo '===== Existing app credentials =====' && az ad app credential list --id $APP 2>&1 | jq '[.[] | {keyId: .keyId[:8], displayName, hint, startDateTime, endDateTime}]' 2>&1 | head -30; echo; echo '===== Aixa for comparison =====' && AS=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name aixa-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); echo "aixa-length=${#AS}"; echo -n 'aixa-first-15: '; printf '%s' "$AS" | cut -c 1-15; echo
